expectations.text: Permissions defined in restricted_reports.permissions.yml with title and description keys
expectations.evidence: restricted_reports.permissions.yml defines 'view restricted reports' with title: 'View restricted reports' and description: 'Access the restricted reports page at /reports/restricted.'

expectations.text: Route has _permission requirement matching the defined permission name
expectations.evidence: Route uses _custom_access with RestrictedReportsAccessChecker::access which checks 'view restricted reports' via AccessResult::allowedIfHasPermission(). This is functionally equivalent to _permission but uses the AccessResult pattern explicitly. The permission name matches what's in permissions.yml.

expectations.text: Controller extends ControllerBase or uses proper access handling
expectations.evidence: RestrictedReportsController.php line 10: 'class RestrictedReportsController extends ControllerBase'. Separate AccessChecker class uses AccessResult::allowedIfHasPermission().

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en restricted_reports returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list showing restricted_reports in enabled modules.

expectations.text: Anonymous gets 403: navigate to /reports/restricted as anonymous user and verify Access denied
expectations.evidence: E2E verified: anonymous user redirected to login with message 'Access denied. You must log in to view this page.' -- standard Drupal 403 behavior for anonymous.

expectations.text: Admin gets 200: navigate to /reports/restricted as admin and verify page loads without access denied
expectations.evidence: E2E verified: after granting 'view restricted reports' permission and logging in via drush uli, page shows heading 'Restricted Reports' and content 'Welcome to Restricted Reports.'
